description.short: Learn by discovery with a Socratic questioning tutor
description.full: Socratic Tutor is a teaching agent that uses the Socratic method to guide you to understanding through reflective questioning instead of direct answers. It helps you build critical-thinking and reasoning skills across programming, academic, and professional topics. Socratic Tutor is designed to work with Microsoft 365 Copilot.

localizationKeys.agentDescription: Socratic Tutor guides you to discover knowledge through questioning.
localizationKeys.agentCSText1: Guide me to understand how async/await works in C# through questions.
localizationKeys.agentCSText2: Help me discover when and why to use the Factory pattern.
localizationKeys.agentCSText3: Walk me through binary search with guiding questions.
localizationKeys.agentCSText4: Help me reason through a common technical interview topic.
localizationKeys.agentCSText5: Lead me to understand the SOLID design principles step by step.
localizationKeys.agentCSText6: Help me learn a concept by discovering it myself.
